creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
Installation/updating of port openimageio results in the below reported issue. The library in question ist available (all links are all right).


[...]
===>   Registering installation for openimageio-1.1.2
pkg: (openimageio-1.1.2) /usr/local/bin/iconvert - shared library libOpenImageIO.so.1.1 not found
pkg: (openimageio-1.1.2) /usr/local/bin/idiff - shared library libOpenImageIO.so.1.1 not found
pkg: (openimageio-1.1.2) /usr/local/bin/igrep - shared library libOpenImageIO.so.1.1 not found
pkg: (openimageio-1.1.2) /usr/local/bin/iinfo - shared library libOpenImageIO.so.1.1 not found
pkg: (openimageio-1.1.2) /usr/local/bin/iv - shared library libOpenImageIO.so.1.1 not found
pkg: (openimageio-1.1.2) /usr/local/bin/maketx - shared library libOpenImageIO.so.1.1 not found
pkg: (openimageio-1.1.2) /usr/local/bin/oiiotool - shared library libOpenImageIO.so.1.1 not found
Installing openimageio-1.1.2... done


Libraries look like this:

root@thor:/usr/local/lib # ll libOpenImageIO.so*
lrwxr-xr-x  1 root  wheel       21 Jan  2 15:19 libOpenImageIO.so@ -> libOpenImageIO.so.1.1
lrwxr-xr-x  1 root  wheel       21 Jan  2 15:19 libOpenImageIO.so.1@ -> libOpenImageIO.so.1.1
lrwxr-xr-x  1 root  wheel       23 Jan  2 15:19 libOpenImageIO.so.1.1@ -> libOpenImageIO.so.1.1.2
-rwxr-xr-x  1 root  wheel  2980432 Jan  2 15:19 libOpenImageIO.so.1.1.2*
